generalization.notes: Renderless `CommandPaletteCore` consumes generic `CommandGroup[]` + label bag. Nosion-specific wiring isolated under `adapters/nosion.tsx` + `adapters/NosionCommandPalette.tsx` (excluded from kitab UP-sync surface). `SearchModal` accepts `labels?: SearchModalLabels` with defaults. Slice index re-exports `CommandPalette` = Nosion adapter for back-compat with the dashboard mount.
